title: the scythe
description: This simple Minecraft mod introduces an exciting new weapon: the scythe. Designed primarily for PvP combat, it is fully compatible with both single-player and multiplayer modes. You don't need any other mod to operate it
body:
About:
The Scythe is a combat utility mod that adds 1 powerful weapon to combine all 3 weapons from Minecraft into 1 item to save your hotbar space. This mod includes the attributes from Minecraft's sword, axe, and mace. Comes with config. Compatible with single-player and servers.
Scythe Attributes


Weapon Summary:


Taking all 3 weapons into one allows the Scythe to obtain all unique weapon mechanics. Sword:
Swings quickly and has the sweeping edge mechanic. Axe:
It causes serious damage per hit and can drop a target's shield. Mace:
It has a density mechanic that lets you knock away enemies and deal damage based on how far you fall.
